case_title: MICROAGE BAY AREA COMPUTERS VS PARADIGM PUBLISHING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $185.00 FILED BY MICROAGE BAY AREA COMPUTERS AS TO DEFENDANT PARADIGM PUBLISHING CLARK RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PARADIGM PUBLISHING CLARK RICHARD
DECLARATION OF SETIADHARMA PRANOWO AND CAMELIA MARA S. BINKLEY FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICROAGE BAY AREA COMPUTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARADIGM PUBLISHING $185.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $213.00, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE WARRANTY FOR THE HARD DISC DRIVE WAS FOR A REPLACEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
